scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && tsx src/server/dev.ts
scripts.dev:local: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && BORING_USE_LOCAL_PACKAGES=1 tsx src/server/dev.ts
scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && vite build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-core build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && tsc --noEmit
